summary_line: Cincinnati OH fee-only fiduciary RIA founded 1990 — $6.39B AUM, 103 employees, 37 advisors, 0 DRPs. Hero is the catalog's most explicit anti-wirehouse rhetoric: 'People / Compassion / Your Trust / Return on Life — VS — Products / Commissions / Our Bottom Line / Return on Investment.' Direct rejection of product-sales model. Tagline: 'This is Life and Wealth, Well Managed.'

notable_events.event: ADV snapshot via IAPD CRD 105664 — 103 employees, 37 advisors, $6,392,730,954 regulatory AUM, 0 DRPs.

Site capture: homepage only. Founded 1990 per meta description. Tagline: 'Fee-only wealth management firm based in Cincinnati, OH. Helping clients achieve financial peace of mind since 1990.' Hero H1 is the catalog's most explicit anti-wirehouse positioning: 'People / Compassion / Your Trust / Return on Life — VS — Products / Commissions / Our Bottom Line / Return on Investment.' H2: 'This is Life and Wealth, Well Managed.' Sub-CTAs: 'Experience the Truepoint Difference,' 'We're Hiring.'
